hook: The more depleted you feel, the more likely you are to chase novelty over alignment.
body: Low-energy dating often makes flashier signals look more compelling than calm compatibility.

hook: Men in burnout mode often confuse intensity with quality because their judgment is tired.
body: When your attention is drained, simplify your filter instead of trusting your impulses more.
